section_title: Where two or more persons have made a joint promise, a release of one
content:
44. Where two or more persons have made a joint promise, a release of one
release of
of such joint promisors by the promisee does not discharge the other joint
one joint
promisor promisor or joint promisors; neither does it free the joint promisors so
released from responsibility to the other joint promisor or joint promisors.
Devolution
